name: Level 2 · Brand Voice Content from RSS Feed

parameters.text:
=Here is a news article:

HEADLINE: {{ $json.title }}
SUMMARY: {{ $json.contentSnippet }}
SOURCE: {{ $json.link }}

Write 3 social media posts based on this article. Format exactly like this:

---INSTAGRAM---
[Casual, engaging Instagram caption under 150 words. Include 5 relevant hashtags at the end.]

---LINKEDIN---
[Professional LinkedIn post under 200 words. Include 3 relevant hashtags.]

---X/TWITTER---
[Punchy tweet under 280 characters. Include 2 relevant hashtags.]

Write every post in the voice described in your system prompt. Do not break character.

options.systemMessage:
You are a social media content writer with a specific brand voice.

[PASTE YOUR COMPLETED BRAND VOICE PROMPT HERE]

This is the voice, tone, audience, and rules you follow for every post you write. Do not deviate from this voice. Do not sound generic. Every post should sound like it could only come from this specific person.

parameters.content:
## WELCOME · n8n Meetup Atlanta · April 22, 2026

You just imported the Level 2 workflow from the live build session.

This is the same workflow as Level 1, with one upgrade: the Claude Model node has a system prompt that writes every post in YOUR brand voice.

──────────────────────────────
GET EVERYTHING HERE:
peopleintheloop.app/n8n_0422
──────────────────────────────

That page has all 4 files from tonight, setup instructions, and the brand voice template you'll need to complete this workflow.

Built by: Nina Thomas, n8n Community Ambassador
People in the Loop · ninathomas.ai

## LEVEL 2 · Brand Voice Content from RSS Feed
Created by: Nina Thomas | People in the Loop
ninathomas.ai | connect@ninathomas.ai

PURPOSE: Same as Level 1 — but Claude writes every post in YOUR brand voice. The workflow is identical. The upgrade is in the system prompt inside the Claude Model node.

SKILL LEVEL: Intermediate
TOOLS: n8n · Claude · Gmail

SETUP:
1. Replace the RSS feed URL in the RSS Feed Trigger node
2. Connect your Anthropic API key to the Claude Model node
3. Open the Claude Model node and paste your completed brand voice prompt where it says [PASTE YOUR COMPLETED BRAND VOICE PROMPT HERE]
4. Connect your Gmail account to the Send Content Email node
5. Update the sendTo email address
6. Click Test workflow to confirm it runs
7. Compare the output to Level 1 — this is the difference brand voice makes
8. Activate the workflow

All resources: peopleintheloop.app/n8n_0422

Built live at: n8n Meetup Atlanta · April 22, 2026

## THE KEY DIFFERENCE

Level 1: Claude is a generic writer.
Level 2: Claude knows who you are.

The workflow structure is identical.
The only change is the system prompt in the Claude Model node.

That system prompt is your brand voice — your tone, your audience, your rules, your examples.

Fill out claude-brand-voice-prompt.md once. Paste it here. Every post after this sounds like you.

## BEFORE YOU START

Same credentials as Level 1:

1. Anthropic API key → Claude Model node
   Get yours: console.anthropic.com

2. Google OAuth2 → Send Content Email node

AND: Your completed brand voice prompt
   Use: claude-brand-voice-prompt.md
   Paste it into the Claude Model node system message field.

## NEXT STEPS

──────────────────────────────
ALL FILES FROM TONIGHT:
peopleintheloop.app/n8n_0422
──────────────────────────────

At that URL you'll find:
→ level1-rss-to-email.json (start here if you haven't)
→ level2-brand-voice-rss-to-email.json (this file)
→ claude-brand-voice-prompt.md (YOUR take-home challenge)
→ claude-skill.md (bonus: turn Claude into your n8n assistant)

YOUR TAKE-HOME CHALLENGE:
Fill out claude-brand-voice-prompt.md for your real brand.
All fields are labeled. Takes about 20 minutes.
Paste it into the Claude Model node system message.
Your workflow will sound like you — not a generic AI.

Join the community for the next workflow drop:
peopleintheloop.app

People in the Loop | ninathomas.ai
